name: Progressive Planet Solutions Inc.
description: Progressive Planet Solutions Inc. is a Canadian company dedicated to creating sustainable, planet-positive products by transforming natural minerals and resources. With over 30 years of experience, the company operates across the agricultural, household, and industrial sectors, providing solutions such as animal health additives, industrial absorbents, and pest control. Additionally, Progressive Planet is innovating within the construction industry through its patent-pending PozGlass™ technology, a low-carbon, glass-based cement replacement designed to reduce the carbon footprint of the global cement sector while promoting environmental sustainability.
